ddls:
CREATE TABLE "training_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training run */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm being trained */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the training run */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the training run */,
  "total_timesteps" INTEGER /* Total number of timesteps during the training run */,
  "num_updates" INTEGER /* Number of updates performed during the training run */,
  "hardware_used" TEXT /* The hardware used for the training run */,
  "environment_config" TEXT /* Configuration details of the environment */,
  "seed" INTEGER /* The random seed used for the training run */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the training run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  "paper_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the research paper or documentation */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters specific to the algorithm */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* Dependencies or libraries required for the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training run associated with this metric */,
  "time_elapsed" REAL /* Time elapsed since the start of the training run */,
  "serial_timesteps" INTEGER /* Number of serial timesteps processed */,
  "ep_len_mean" REAL /* Mean episode length during the run */,
  "ep_reward_mean" REAL /* Mean episode reward during the run */,
  "policy_loss" REAL /* Policy loss during the run */,
  "value_loss" REAL /* Value loss during the run */,
  "clipfrac" REAL /* Clipping fraction during updates */,
  "episode_count" INTEGER /* Total number of episodes completed during the training run */,
  "timesteps_per_episode" REAL /* Average number of timesteps per episode */,
  "max_reward" REAL /* Maximum reward achieved in a single episode */,
  "min_reward" REAL /* Minimum reward achieved in a single episode */,
  "std_reward" REAL /* Standard deviation of rewards across episodes */,
  "exploration_rate" REAL /* The exploration rate (epsilon) used during the training run */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* The learning rate used during the training run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES training_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department or team the user belongs to */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* The date the user joined the organization */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last date and time the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "run_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training run being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the training run */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the training run was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* The device used to access the training run */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_run_access_logs_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES training_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "run_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training run associated with this result */,
  "final_reward" REAL /* Final reward achieved at the end of the training run */,
  "final_policy_loss" REAL /* Final policy loss at the end of the training run */,
  "final_value_loss" REAL /* Final value loss at the end of the training run */,
  "total_episodes" INTEGER /* Total number of episodes completed during the training run */,
  "total_timesteps" INTEGER /* Total number of timesteps processed during the training run */,
  "final_exploration_rate" REAL /* The final exploration rate (epsilon) at the end of the training run */,
  "final_learning_rate" REAL /* The final learning rate at the end of the training run */,
  "convergence_time" REAL /* Time taken for the algorithm to converge (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_run_results_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES training_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training run associated with these parameters */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate used during training */,
  "gamma" REAL /* Discount factor (gamma) used in training */,
  "epsilon" REAL /* Epsilon value for exploration strategy */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used during training */,
  "buffer_size" INTEGER /* Size of the experience replay buffer */,
  "target_update" INTEGER /* Frequency of target network updates */,
  "tau" REAL /* Soft update parameter for target network */,
  "clip_range" REAL /* Range for clipping gradients */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_parameters_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES training_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the environment */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the environment */,
  "render_mode" TEXT /* The mode in which the environment is rendered */,
  "observation_space" TEXT /* The observation space of the environment */,
  "action_space" TEXT /* The action space of the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "run_environment_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training run */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment used during the training run */,
  "environment_version" TEXT /* The version of the environment used during the training run */,
  "environment_settings" TEXT /* Specific settings or configurations of the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_run_environment_links_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_run_environment_links_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES training_runs ("run_id")
)
